ai_revenue.sentence: All up, our AI business is on track to surpass an annual revenue run rate of $10 billion next quarter, which will make it the fastest business in our history to reach this milestone.
ai_revenue.notes: stated as on-track for next quarter

ai_revenue.sentence: And our AI business has now surpassed an annual revenue run rate of $13 billion up 175% year-over-year.
Our AI business surpassed $37 billion ARR, up 123%.
In the first 3 years of this AI wave, AWS' AI revenue run rate is over $15 billion, nearly 260x larger.
ai_revenue.notes: AWS AI-specific; 3 years into AI wave

ai_revenue.sentence: If you combine Traneum and Graviton, it's well over a $10 billion annualized run rate business it's still very early there so I'm very optimistic about what we're seeing, know, the Project Rainier has gone very well.
ai_revenue.notes: custom silicon (Trainium+Graviton) run rate; transcript spelling artifact

ai_revenue.sentence: AWS revenue grew 12% year-over-year in Q3, with $919 million of incremental quarter-over-quarter revenue and now has the annualized revenue run rate of $92 billion.
AWS now has an annualized revenue run rate of $115 billion.
We added $2.6 billion in quarter over quarter revenue and AWS now has an annualized revenue run rate of $142 billion.
AWS is now a $150 billion annualized revenue run rate business.
In AI alone, we signed contracts with 30 different customers for $12.5 billion in new AI business.
ai_revenue.notes: new AI contracts signed, FY2024 Q4

ai_revenue.sentence: Well, Anthropic recently reported that its annualized run rate revenue has reached $7 billion as of last month, up from $1 billion at the start of the year.
ai_revenue.notes: NVIDIA management citing Anthropic's reported ARR; up from $1bn at start of year

ai_revenue.sentence: As we continue on our hyper-growth trajectory, we expect to exit 2026 with annualized run rate revenue of $17 billion to $19 billion, which we expect to grow to more than $30 billion of annualized run rate revenue as we exit 2027.
We now expect to end 2026 with $18 billion to $19 billion of annualized run rate revenue, increasing the low end of our expectations by $1 billion.

We continue to expect to grow annualized run rate revenue to more than $30 billion as we exit 2027 more than 75% of which is already contracted, excluding any benefit from not-yet-exercised customer renewals.
Annualized run rate revenue for our Nebius AI business reached $1.9 billion at the end of March, up over 50% from $1.25 billion in the previous quarter.

As such, we are reiterating our full year 2026 guidance for annualized run rate revenue of $7 billion to $9 billion, group revenue of between $3 billion and $3.4 billion and group adjusted EBITDA margin of around 40%.
Based on the strength of demand that we see and our accelerated capacity growth plan, we believe we can achieve annualized run rate revenue (ARR) of $7 to $9 billion by the end of 2026.

Today, we have approximately $2.3 billion of annualized revenue run rate under contract, including around $0.4 billion at Prince George which we expect to increase over the coming weeks as we finalize negotiations for the remaining capacity there.
We increased ARR under contract to $3.1 billion, remain on track to hit $3.7 billion exiting calendar 2026.
Turning to our data center AI business, we delivered our third straight quarter of record data center GPU revenue with MI300 quarterly revenue exceeding $1 billion for the first time.
ai_revenue.notes: quarterly >$1bn annualized ~4bn; EXCLUDED from Vp (consolidation rule) - context only

ai_revenue.sentence: Google Cloud FY2025 segment revenue $58.705bn (10-K segment data).
Oracle Cloud & License FY2025 segment revenue $49.23bn (10-K); mostly traditional license + SaaS.
ai_revenue.notes: apply oracle_cloud_ai_share - LOW, OCI-AI is a small slice

ai_revenue.sentence: CoreWeave trailing-4q revenue ~$6.23bn (Q2-Q4 2025 + Q1 2026 income statements); pure-play AI compute.
IREN trailing-4q revenue ~$0.76bn; transitioning from bitcoin mining to AI cloud - overstates AI slice.
Applied Digital trailing-4q revenue ~$0.36bn; data-centre hosting transitioning to AI/HPC.

ledger.parties: CoreWeave / private credit lenders (Blackstone-led et al.)
ledger.notes: Delayed-draw term loan facility 2024; see 10-K debt footnote for full facility stack; announced date approximate (facility closed Oct 2024)

ledger.parties: Anthropic / GIC + Coatue leads incl. Microsoft & NVIDIA portions
ledger.notes: Includes portions of previously announced Microsoft and NVIDIA strategic investments - vendor capital into a customer
Bloomberg reported the raise as tied to NVIDIA chip purchases (vendor link not confirmed in primary release); announced date approximate from corporate post

ledger.parties: Applied Digital (APLD) / Goldman Sachs (arranger), First National Bank of Omaha (agent)
ledger.notes: $350m committed revolving credit facility + $200m accordion (up to $550m). Closed May 29 2026, announced June 8. Secured by non-data-center project assets; SOFR+225bps; matures May 29 2029. Neocloud K-holder. JUDGMENT CALL: instrument=private_credit (Goldman-arranged secured revolver; enum has no 'revolver'/'bank_facility'). amount=committed $350m.

144A senior UNSECURED notes: $1.25bn 9.625% due 2032 + EUR2bn 8.500% due 2032. Priced June 11, closing June 18 2026. EUR2bn converted at ECB ref 1.1537 (2026-06-11)=$2.307bn -> total ~$3.557bn. JUDGMENT CALL: instrument=private_credit as external sub-IG (high-yield) credit to a neocloud K-holder; enum lacks plain 'senior_notes'. Proceeds: general corporate incl. debt repayment.

ledger.parties: Hut 8 (HUT) / Beacon Point DC LLC (SPV issuer) / 144A QIBs; JPMorgan + Goldman Sachs bookrunners
ledger.notes: $4.25bn 6.129% senior SECURED notes due 2042, issued by SPV Beacon Point DC LLC, non-recourse to Hut 8, rated Baa2, fully amortizing. Funds 352MW Nueces County TX data center leased to undisclosed AA-or-higher tenant (likely hyperscaler). Priced June 4, closed June 9 2026. JUDGMENT CALL: instrument='abs' (lease/asset-backed, rated, 144A); could be 'spv'/project-finance. Pricing PR: prnewswire.com/news-releases/.../302792238.html

$458m 1.250% convertible senior notes due Jan 15 2032 (incl. $58m greenshoe), senior unsecured, fully guaranteed by Bitfarms Ltd. Conversion ~$7.41 (25% premium); net proceeds ~$445.4m for AI/HPC data-center development (Panther Creek, Sharon, Moses Lake). Smaller speculative developer; <1yr cash runway per analysts.

ledger.parties: Apollo + Blackstone (lead lenders) / Broadcom (AI XPV, residual-value guarantee) / Anthropic (lessee) / Google TPUs; SPV by Apollo Atlas SP
ledger.notes: Initial $35bn tranche of Broadcom AI XPV Platform (targets >20GW compute by 2028). SPV (Apollo Atlas SP) buys Google/Broadcom-codesigned TPUs and leases to Anthropic; debt serviced by lease payments. Tranches: $6bn A1 (UST+100bps, banks) + $24bn A2 (5.75%) both w/ Broadcom residual-value guarantee (mid-IG private ratings) + $4.5bn B (8.5%, unguaranteed) + ~$0.8bn Apollo Atlas equity. CIRCULAR: chip vendor (Broadcom) backstops financing for chips used by an AI lab. Anthropic >1GW at Fluidstack sites from mid-2026. Co-primary: blackstone.com/news/press/broadcom-apollo-and-blackstone-establish-landmark-strategic-platform-...

ledger.parties: Cipher Digital Inc. (CIFR) / Stingray Compute LLC (SPV issuer) / 144A QIBs; Amazon Data Services (tenant)
ledger.notes: $810.0m senior SECURED notes 6.000% due 2031, issued by SPV Stingray Compute LLC; funds 70MW data center in Andrews, TX pre-leased to Amazon Data Services (15-yr triple-net + Amazon parent guarantee, ~$2.0bn contracted revenue). Priced June 8, closing ~June 15 2026. Proceeds: finance Stingray facility, reimburse ~$61.5m prior equity, fund debt service reserves. JUDGMENT CALL: instrument='abs' (SPV lease/asset-backed; mirrors Hut 8 Beacon Point coding). Announced June 8 - missed in prior harvest, caught 2026-06-22.

ledger.parties: Applied Digital Corporation (APLD) / APLD ComputeCo 3 LLC (subsidiary issuer) / 144A QIBs; CoreWeave (tenant)
ledger.notes: $1.59bn senior SECURED notes 7.000% due 2031, issued by subsidiary APLD ComputeCo 3 LLC, funding the fourth building at Polaris Forge 1 (Ellendale, ND); secured by APLD ELN-04 project entities; campus leased to CoreWeave (~$7.5bn / 15-yr / 300MW). Announced June 9, closed June 16 2026. SEPARATE instrument from the $350m APLD revolver already in ledger. JUDGMENT CALL: instrument='abs' (project/lease-backed secured notes). Announced June 9 - missed in prior harvest, caught 2026-06-22.

ledger.parties: Duos Technologies (DUOT) / Duos Edge AI - GPUaaS, LLC (bankruptcy-remote borrower) / USD.AI (lender)
ledger.discovery_source: Cowork contemporaneous harvest 2026-06-22 (Perplexity/Tavily/Firecrawl); re-sourced to SEC 8-K
ledger.notes: $98.1m three-year asset-based debt facility from specialty lender USD.AI to Duos Edge AI - GPUaaS, LLC (bankruptcy-remote subsidiary), collateralized by 2,304 NVIDIA B300 GPUs, funding a GPU-as-a-service deployment. Event date June 5; 8-K filed June 11 2026. Coupon not disclosed. JUDGMENT CALL: instrument='private_credit' (non-bank GPU-backed asset-based finance). Small but a clean GPU-collateralized ABF data point. Announced June 5 - missed in prior harvest, caught 2026-06-22.

ledger.parties: Switch, Ltd. / syndicate arranged by TD Securities, Wells Fargo, BBVA, Natixis
ledger.notes: Switch (private; DigitalBridge/IFM-owned) extended and upsized its Corporate Revolving Credit Facility to MORE THAN $6bn and its syndicated performance Letter-of-Credit facility to $3.5bn (combined ~$10bn, up from $2.6bn in Apr 2026). Arrangers TD Securities, Wells Fargo, BBVA, Natixis. For gigawatt-scale AI/cloud campus growth, power procurement, contracted pipeline. Announced June 10 2026. JUDGMENT CALLS: (1) instrument='private_credit' although this is a SYNDICATED BANK facility (enum lacks 'revolver'/'bank_facility'); (2) amount=$6.0bn revolver only (committed, largely undrawn); $3.5bn LC excluded to avoid double-count; total ~$10bn; (3) committed-capacity vs drawn-debt - flagged for Allan.
